self_improvement.claim: Architecture review outcomes will become more comparable and less prose-dependent because review scoring and next-state resolution now run through one canonical helper.
self_improvement.mechanism: The review lane now resolves required checks, anti-pattern penalties, review result, and next lifecycle transition in product-owned code.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Architecture review doctrine existed, but review score and next-state resolution still depended on checklist interpretation.
self_improvement.expected_effect: Future review-oriented slices can use one deterministic review path instead of re-deriving outcome logic from Markdown.
self_improvement.verification_notes: The Impeccable Architecture review check now consumes the executable review resolver.

decision.rationale: The mechanism passed review, met adoption readiness, and remains valuable as Directive-owned Architecture output.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
